services.label: Design & UI/UX
services.description: Product design, design systems, motion. Wireframes to high-fidelity in Figma. Brand, type, color.

services.label: Mobile apps
services.description: iOS, Android, cross-platform. React Native, Expo, native modules when needed.

services.label: Web apps & SaaS
services.description: Marketing sites, multi-role dashboards, full-stack platforms. React, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind, shadcn.

services.label: AI & ML engineering
services.description: LLM features (RAG, agents, vision), custom ML models in production. OpenAI, Claude, Vertex AI, CatBoost.

services.label: Backend, data & automation
services.description: APIs, scrapers, data pipelines, workflow automation, auth, payments, deploy. Supabase, Firebase, Postgres, Apify, Edge Functions.

about.label: About
about.intro: I run The Dev Agency. I design and build software end-to-end — mobile apps, web platforms, AI automation and features.
about.products: Several live products counting tens of thousands of users: Bet.AI, Lastr, Creator Platform, Reel Farm…
about.outro: Want to work together? Shoot me an email —

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Tell us about your project.
contact.intro: The more concrete, the better. Stage, scope, timeline, what's stuck. We'll respond within 48 hours.
contact.emailIntro: Include: what you're building, where you are (idea / MVP / scaling), what you need (end-to-end / a specific layer), and your rough timeline. The more context up front, the faster we can tell you whether we're a fit.

bet-ai.tagline: Scan any bet slip. Get instant AI analysis.
bet-ai.architecture: Expo SDK 52 frontend with a Firebase backend (Auth, Firestore, Storage, ~7K LOC of Cloud Functions). Six sports data providers feed parallel pipelines covering NBA, NCAA basketball, NFL, NCAA football, all major EU soccer leagues, MMA/UFC, and tennis Grand Slams. A custom CatBoost model deployed on Google Cloud Vertex AI computes 88 engineered features per prediction, hitting 70%+ accuracy on high-confidence interval player prop calls.

features.title: Bet slip scan
features.description: Image captured via camera or gallery, OCR'd by GPT-4 Vision, then parsed into typed bet slip data and rendered as a structured analysis.

features.title: Six-source data aggregation
features.description: Parallel pipelines pull from The Odds API, SportsGameOdds (with key rotation), API-Sports, StatPal, API-Tennis, and WeatherAPI per request.

features.title: Custom ML props model
features.description: CatBoost on Google Cloud Vertex AI. 88 engineered features per prediction from real-time player game logs. NBA and soccer props hit 70%+ accuracy on high-confidence interval calls.

features.title: Multi-sport coverage
features.description: NBA + NCAA basketball, NFL + NCAA football, all major EU soccer leagues, MMA/UFC, and tennis Grand Slams + main tournaments.

features.title: Match intelligence layer
features.description: Recent form, head-to-head, momentum, x-factors, and a written AI breakdown surfaced alongside odds and value ratings on every analysis.

features.title: Real-time orchestration
features.description: ~7K LOC of Firebase Cloud Functions running parallel async calls per analysis. Firestore cache layer with TTL controls keeps response time low across six external APIs.

creator-platform.tagline: End-to-end UGC creator management for Bet.AI's growth team.
creator-platform.architecture: Multi-role SaaS on Vite + React with a Supabase backend (Postgres, Auth, Storage, Deno Edge Functions). Apify actors and custom scrapers ingest engagement metrics on thousands of posts from hundreds of creators daily; RevenueCat data is pulled for revenue attribution. Three role-gated dashboards — UGC creator, account manager, admin — share one schema scoped by RLS.

features.title: Engagement ingestion
features.description: Apify actors and custom scrapers ingest engagement metrics on thousands of posts from hundreds of creators daily, upserted into Postgres.

features.title: RevenueCat sync
features.description: Subscription and revenue data pulled from RevenueCat for per-creator attribution and downstream KPI calculation.

features.title: Revenue KPIs
features.description: Admin dashboard tracks eCPM, RPM, ARPU, and total revenue across creators and time windows, computed via Postgres views.

features.title: Payout engine
features.description: Per-creator payouts computed from view thresholds and post-count tiers; surfaced in an admin review queue and per-creator payout history tabs.

features.title: Sports-aware calendar
features.description: Upcoming games scraped from sports APIs, paired with content-format templates so creators can plan posts against live events.

features.title: Applications dashboard
features.description: Admin reviews creator applications, approves/rejects, and manages role-based access (creator / AM / admin) backed by Supabase Auth + RLS.

lastr.architecture: Expo SDK 52 + Expo Router + Supabase + Zustand. The technical investment is concentrated in the interaction layer — Reanimated 3 transitions, Lottie cues, expo-haptics on every interaction, gradient and blur ambient backgrounds, and a 13-step onboarding flow architected around social proof, perceived effort, and a custom-plan reveal moment.

features.title: 13-step onboarding flow
features.description: Welcome → questions → symptoms → social proof → analyzing → analysis reveal → education → custom plan → rating → paywall → login. Built around perceived effort, personalization, and psychological hooks.

features.title: Reanimated 3 transitions
features.description: Every screen uses spring/timing animations and FadeInDown entries. Layout transitions, interpolated gestures, sharedValue state. Movement reads as kinetic — no jumps, no jank.

features.title: Ambient visual layer
features.description: LinearGradient backgrounds, BlurView overlays, animated ambient glows behind hero CTAs. Consistent black + warm amber palette across every surface in the app.

features.title: Tactile feedback
features.description: expo-haptics fires on every meaningful interaction — taps, swipes, screen advance. Calibrated to reinforce intent without being noisy.

features.title: Custom design system
features.description: Hand-built reusable components: ShimmerCTA, AnimatedSplash, AnimatedIcon, OnboardingProgressBar, ProgressGraph, OptionButton. DM Sans + Inter typography, single color constants file.

features.title: 90-day program engine
features.description: Daily sessions across three modalities (body-scan, breathing, physical) with Lottie cues and timers. Streak, score, and day tracked in Zustand (AsyncStorage-persisted) and Supabase. RevenueCat gates the full program.
